title: centaurea cariensis subsp. niveotomentosa
intro: Centaurea cariensis subsp. niveotomentosa, also known as Snowy Mountain Centaury, is a perennial plant species belonging to the daisy family Asteraceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Centaurea cariensis subsp. niveotomentosa include its potential to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as its ability to support the immune system. The plant is often used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
